validationAnswers.evidence: Promptfoo stdout includes Cache is disabled, Starting evaluation eval-Cms-2026-06-07T17:12:46, and Running 4 test cases (up to 1 at a time).
validationAnswers.assessment: The direct node.exe spawn fix changed behavior from the Stream 37 quick no-results exit to a real filtered Promptfoo run, but it did not complete or refresh results/promptfoo-latest.json under the 300000 ms cap.

stream37Row.stderr: Promptfoo exited successfully but did not emit pass totals or refresh results/promptfoo-latest.json.

stream37Comparison.stream38Delta: Stream 37 exited in 530 ms as eval_no_results with no Promptfoo result refresh. Stream 38 started Promptfoo directly, selected 4 filtered tests, ran until the 300000 ms timeout, and wrote eval_timeout with no pass totals.

promptfooLatestStatus.assessment: results/promptfoo-latest.json still points to the Stream 34 31B-QAT surface and was not refreshed by Stream 38.

summaryAccounting.assessment: summarize-matrix selected the Stream 38 matrix JSONL, ignored the progress sidecar, and did not count the timeout/no-pass row as completed.

closedOrSharpened: Runner spawn fix validation: Promptfoo now starts as a direct node.exe child, applies the task filter, and begins the selected 4-test run instead of quick eval_no_results.
Progress telemetry was produced and latest progress reached run_finished.
The row is not counted as completed because pass totals were not produced.
